evals.name: telco-sdlc-balanced
evals.prompt: Enrich the research report at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-research/ai-vs-traditional-software-engineering-a-2026-03-24/output/report.md with density balanced. Use the default theme.
evals.expected_output: Themed HTML file with 10-15 enrichments spread across sections: KPI dashboard in executive summary, comparison-bar charts for data tables, stat-charts for statistical clusters, summary-cards for long sections with thesis statements. No enrichments in References section.
assertions: Executive Summary section receives a kpi-dashboard enrichment
Enrichment plan contains 10-15 total enrichments at balanced density
No enrichments are placed in the References section
Sections with comparison tables receive comparison-bar enrichments
At least one process-flow enrichment is generated for sections describing sequential workflows
Sections with 800+ words and a thesis statement receive summary-card enrichments
Enrichments are distributed across at least 6 of the 10 H2 sections
The enrichment-plan.json validates against the enrichment-plan.schema.json
The output HTML file exists and contains Chart.js script references

evals.name: telco-sdlc-minimal
evals.prompt: Enrich the research report at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-research/ai-vs-traditional-software-engineering-a-2026-03-24/output/report.md with density minimal.
evals.expected_output: Themed HTML file with 5-8 enrichments: only executive-summary KPI dashboard and highest-scoring content-pattern matches. No per-section baseline forced.
assertions: Enrichment plan contains 5-8 total enrichments at minimal density
No per-section baseline consistency rule is applied at minimal density
No enrichments are placed in the References section
